name: sec-edgar-actor
title: SEC EDGAR Filing Parser
description: Parses 10-K and 10-Q filings for hiring and growth signals

input.title: Input
input.description: Target companies and lookback settings for SEC filing analysis.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Company names or SEC CIK numbers to monitor.

lookbackDays.title: Days to look back
lookbackDays.description: Only include SEC filings published within this many days.
